base_prompt: cinematic photography, dramatic composition, high contrast, professional color grading
color_palette: desaturated blues, deep shadows, selective warm highlights
lighting: three-point lighting, strong rim light, motivated sources
camera: anamorphic lens, shallow depth of field, slight lens flare
texture: subtle film grain, crisp edges, photoreal surfaces
negative_prompt: cartoon, anime, flat colors, overexposed, amateur, watermark, text

base_prompt: high quality anime screenshot, Makoto Shinkai style, ethereal, highly detailed
color_palette: pastel pinks, soft blues, bright daylight, mint greens
lighting: soft diffused sunlight, glowing bloom, volumetric light rays
camera: wide angle, slight fisheye, bright exposure
texture: cel shaded, watercolor backgrounds, clean lines
negative_prompt: 3D, photorealistic, dark, gritty, grayscale, ugly, distorted

base_prompt: soft watercolor painting, ethereal brush strokes, delicate, traditional art
color_palette: translucent washes, soft primary colors, paper white highlights
lighting: flat natural light, no harsh shadows, airy
camera: imperceptible, flat 2D perspective
texture: rough cold-pressed watercolor paper, pigment blooms, wet-on-wet
negative_prompt: glossy, digital, photorealistic, 3D render, sharp edges, neon

base_prompt: classic baroque oil painting, masterwork, dramatic chiaroscuro, ornate
color_palette: deep reds, rich golds, dark umber, stark black
lighting: single dramatic light source, high contrast shadows, spotlight effect
camera: classic portrait angle, medium shot, eye level
texture: thick impasto brush strokes, cracked canvas, glossy varnish
negative_prompt: modern, low contrast, anime, digital art, flat lighting

base_prompt: 8-bit pixel art, retro video game style, isometric or side-scrolling, nostalgic
color_palette: limited 256-color palette, vibrant neon primaries, solid blacks
lighting: flat shading, no gradients, hard light
camera: top-down or pure side profile, orthogonal projection
texture: blocky pixels, sharp edges, no anti-aliasing, retro screen artifacts
negative_prompt: high resolution, photorealistic, soft gradients, 3D, curved lines

base_prompt: synthwave aesthetic, 1980s retro-futurism, outrun style, glowing grid
color_palette: neon magenta, cyan, electric purple, dark background
lighting: glowing neon tubes, stark rim lighting, dark moody atmosphere
camera: low angle, dramatic perspective towards vanishing point
texture: smooth plastic, glossy reflections, scanlines, VHS tracking errors
negative_prompt: natural, daylight, rustic, vintage, soft colors, matte

base_prompt: National Geographic documentary photography, photojournalism, realistic

base_prompt: American comic book art, graphic novel style, bold ink lines, dynamic
